chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Superiority of the Married Person Over the Unmarried Person

text: 4349 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ: "أَكْثَرُ أَهْلِ اَلنَّارِ اَلْعُزَّابُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4349 - It has been narrated that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: "The majority of the inhabitants of the Fire are the unmarried."
